answer:
\boxed{C}

Steven Moffatt is the most well-known British writer who has worked on both *Doctor Who* (as showrunner and writer) and *Sherlock* (as creator and writer). While Toby Whithouse (*Sherlock* episodes) and Russell T Davies (*Doctor Who* showrunner) have also contributed, Moffatt is the only option who has directly written for both series.
